FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Safe Haven Reputation
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Word has spread across the region that your settlements are safe, well-governed places to live. Families, workers, and entrepreneurs are drawn to the prospect of a stable life under your protection. How do you respond to this influx of interest?

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Open the gates. Everyone deserves safety. Growth is strength.
We appreciate the sentiment, but let's not draw too much attention.
Screen applicants carefully. We want skilled, productive citizens.
Declare a formal sanctuary. We protect all who seek peace.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Open Arms
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your settlements throw open their gates. Newcomers flood in — families, tradespeople, farmers. The population swells significantly, though your growing visibility also draws the attention of less savory elements.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Quiet Pride
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: You quietly discourage mass immigration while appreciating the compliment. Your existing citizens take pride in the reputation, and morale improves. Sometimes the best reward is knowing you've built something good.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Selective Immigration
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your screening process identifies the most skilled and productive applicants. The newcomers integrate smoothly, bringing expertise that immediately improves the settlement's output. Quality over quantity.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Formal Sanctuary
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your settlements are formally declared sanctuaries — places where anyone fleeing violence or hardship is guaranteed shelter and safety. The declaration resonates across the region, drawing a steady stream of grateful newcomers.
